items.text: You said bars were no hard matter...

... and tempted Providence!
No bars this time!

Indeed, no more bars for you,
Gravy Sorcerer!

items.comment: He is confused -- he *did* do research on how to keep gravy warm on the table, with MODERATE SUCCESS mind you ... but from the tone he knows this is supposed to be an insult. Flustered about how to reply.

items.text:
Let us be off, Ratleigh,
and leave them to ponder their mistakes...
of which, there are so, SO many.

Wait!
You still haven't paid us
for the appraisal!
